<action>

<thought>

Since that doesn’t step into lava ('L') or a wall ('#'), I will move forward to progress upward toward the unknown area and potentially the goal.
</thought>
<action>

<thought>

<thought>

So I should first move away from column D toward the right side where column E/F have floors and may allow progress toward the goal. The cell in front of me (north) is lava, so I’ll turn right to face east and approach safer cells.
